_comment: Orientation eval task suite. Each task runs in an ephemeral worktree at pinnedCommit, once per arm (frame = full Frame context, bare = AGENTS/CLAUDE/STRUCTURE/NOTES/tasks/find-module removed). successCheck is a shell command run in the worktree after the agent finishes; exit 0 = pass. Prompts name concepts, not files — finding the right file IS the thing being measured (except the scripts/* tasks, which name their file for both arms equally).

tasks.prompt: Add a command palette command named 'Toggle GitHub Panel' that emits the existing TOGGLE_GITHUB_PANEL IPC channel. Follow the pattern of the existing registered commands.
Make the Claude usage polling interval configurable through a CLAUDE_USAGE_POLL_MS environment variable. The current default must stay unchanged when the variable is not set.

Add a LOG_LEVEL environment variable (error | warn | info | debug) to the app's logging module so lower-severity output can be filtered out. Default behavior must stay as it is today when the variable is unset.
When the GitHub issues panel has zero issues to show, render the exact text 'No open issues' in the panel body instead of leaving it blank.
Add an application menu item labeled 'Check Freshness' that runs the project's freshness checker script (scripts/check-freshness.js) and logs its output to the console.

In the main-process module that owns tasks.json CRUD, validate the priority field when a task is added: only 'high', 'medium', or 'low' are allowed, anything else is coerced to 'medium'. Add the constant VALID_PRIORITIES for the allowed list.
Enforce a minimum sidebar width of 180px in the sidebar resize logic, using a named constant MIN_SIDEBAR_WIDTH.
Add a --verbose flag to scripts/check-freshness.js that, in the human-readable mode, also prints one '✓ [check-name] ok' line for every check that produced no findings.
In scripts/check-freshness.js, allow the stuck-task threshold to be overridden with a FRAME_STALE_TASK_DAYS environment variable (default stays 14).
Teach scripts/update-structure.js to skip files ending in .test.js when it scans src/ so test files never become modules in STRUCTURE.json.
tasks.successCheck: grep -q 'test\.js' scripts/update-structure.js && node -e "const fs=require('fs');fs.mkdirSync('src/tmp-eval',{recursive:true});fs.writeFileSync('src/tmp-eval/foo.test.js','function fooBarEval(){}\n');" && node scripts/update-structure.js >/dev/null 2>&1 && node -e "const s=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('STRUCTURE.json','utf-8'));process.exit(s.modules && s.modules['tmp-eval/foo.test'] ? 1 : 0)"
